name: GoldRush
description: Covalents multichain data API for balances, logs, pricing, smart-contract events and OHLCV across 100+ blockchains.

seo.title: GoldRush — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: GoldRush: Covalents multichain data API for balances, logs, pricing, smart-contract events and OHLCV across 100+ blockchains.

when_to_use: Multi-chain token balance API for crypto portfolio app
OHLCV price data for 100+ chains in analytics tool
Smart contract event indexing for DeFi dashboard
NFT ownership and metadata queries across chains
Blockchain data API for compliance and audit tools

pros: Balances, logs, OHLCV in one API
Good for portfolio and analytics apps
review.verdict: Still one of the best multichain data APIs around, just watch brand/product churn.
review.best_for: Wallets, dashboards, and analytics needing cross-chain balance and event data
review.not_for: Teams happy with single-chain direct RPC and avoiding vendor dependencies

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium tier; no explicit peak-lock or reserved-capacity evidence.
